added_items.final_wording: Defines adult headache telehealth scope in DHA-licensed facilities and emergency exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Headaches in Adults
source.population: Adults with headache.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth headache documentation; partial because the baseline workflow has no adult-only filter and is not telehealth-only.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines adult headache telehealth scope in DHA-licensed facilities and emergency exclusions.

added_items.rationale: Supports adult telehealth headache presentation context without extending to children or emergency treatment.

added_items.final_wording: Provides systemic, neurologic, onset, associated-feature, and pattern-change red-flag domains.

source.title: Headaches in over 12s: diagnosis and management
source.population: People aged 12 years and over with headache disorders, including migraine.
source.setting: Primary and specialist assessment and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for headache and migraine assessment in people aged 12 years and over; partial for adult-only DHA comparison and not directly validated for UAE pathways outside the DHA source.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports sudden onset, neurological deficit, fever, trauma, pattern change, unexplained vomiting, further investigation or referral, and structured headache-diary fields.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped sudden-onset, focal-neurological, fever, trauma, age, pattern-change, vomiting, investigation, and referral fields.

added_items.final_wording: Supports headache location, quality, severity, duration, frequency, activity impact, nausea, vomiting, light or sound sensitivity, aura, menstrual relation, and medication-overuse review.
